name: Rikugan
author: buzzer-re
description: Rikugan reverse engineering companion for Binary Ninja.
longdescription: Rikugan embeds an agentic LLM workflow into Binary Ninja with native tooling, skills, and an integrated chat sidebar. Supports multiple LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Ollama) and MCP tool servers.

installinstructions.Darwin: Clone/symlink this repository into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/rikugan
